title: mod-writer v0.7.0 — Phase 4: Dataset Diversification & Feature Expansion
status: Phase 4 in progress — 4.1 multi-zone dataset building, 4.2 feature expansion in progress

phases.name: Multi-Zone Synthetic Dataset
phases.description: Expand synthetic training data from 100 examples (zone=1 only) to balanced 9-zone dataset. ~900 examples total (100 per zone) or ~3700 (100 per delta 0-36). This is the single highest-accuracy lever: zone-balanced data should push zone accuracy from ~10% → 40–60%.
tasks: Extend data_collector.build_dataset() to accept zones=[1..9] or delta=True flag (done)
Generate per-zone datasets: SongBuilder(zone=z, aq_seed=s) for z in 1..9, s in 0..99
Store zone and delta labels in NPZ alongside X/y (zone: int 1..9, delta: int 0..36)
Optionally generate full 37-delta dataset (aq=0..999) → ~3700 examples; downsample to balanced for training
Add dataset manifest: dataset_zones.npz, dataset_delta.npz with metadata describing distribution
Update classifier trainer to accept zone-balanced data and compute stratified train/test splits
Retrain baseline MLPRegressor on multi-zone data; evaluate zone accuracy
If accuracy still low, consider zone-classifier (9-class softmax) instead of regression

phases.name: MIR Feature Expansion (Essentia-full + selective hand-crafted)
phases.description: Current 29-dim profile is shallow. Expand to 60–100 dimensions using Essentia's built-in extractors and targeted librosa/essentia algorithms. Focus on rhythmic, tonal, spectral contrast, and MFCCs. Keep extraction lightweight; avoid heavy NNs (musicnn) unless explicitly opt-in.
tasks: Audit Essentia's built-in extractors: MusicExtractor, FreesoundExtractor, LowLevelSpectralExtractor
Implement use_all=True path in MIRFeatureExtractor: call Essentia pool extractor and flatten numeric fields
Add targeted hand-crafted features even without librosa: Danceability, RhythmPatterns, SpectralContrast, MFCC, Chroma, Chord Complexity
Update _flatten() in classifier to accept expanded feature vector; backward-compatible (detect length)
Create feature name registry: MIRFeatureExtractor.get_feature_names() returns ordered list matching flatten order
Validate on 10-track real set; ensure no NaNs and extraction doesn't crash
Compare feature count: baseline 29 → expanded 60+; note dimensionality impact on training speed

phases.name: Zone-Classifier Training (optional)
phases.description: Switch from AQ regression (continuous) to zone classification (9-class softmax). More stable gradients, interpretable confusion matrix. Compare zone accuracy to regression→digital-root baseline.
tasks: Add zone-labeled targets to data_collector output (already in 4.1)
Implement MLPClassifier (9-class) in trainer.py; keep regressor as fallback
Train both models on same dataset; compare top-1 zone accuracy, top-3 accuracy
Generate per-zone confusion matrix; identify most-confused zone pairs (e.g., 6↔9)
Evaluate both on real-audio set; report which objective generalises better

phases.name: Vocal Presence Detection (optional, advanced)
phases.description: Given corpus includes chants, hymns, and vocal-heavy ambient, vocal ratio is a discriminative feature. Add lightweight vocal activity detector (VAD) without heavy dependencies.
tasks: Research lightweight VAD options: percussive/harmonic separation ratio (librosa.effects.hpss), spectral flatness in speech formant bands (300–3000 Hz)
Implement vocal_ratio feature in mir_profiler without new dependencies
Correlate vocal_ratio with zone labels; test discriminative power on real set
If strong correlation found, add to default feature set; else keep as optional

phases.name: Validation Suite Expansion & Hyperparameter Tuning
phases.description: Build proper held-out validation: 40 tracks (4–5 per zone) from diverse sources. Tune classifier hyperparameters (layer sizes, dropout, learning rate). Report final metrics.
tasks: Curate held-out real-audio set: 40 tracks balanced across zones 1–9 (if possible)
Run multi-zone classifier on held-out; report per-zone precision/recall/F1
Tune MLP architecture: try (256,128), dropout 0.2–0.5, early stopping
Compare against random forest baseline (sklearn.RandomForestClassifier)
Document final model choice; freeze artifacts; tag v0.7.0

success_criteria: Multi-zone dataset generated: ≥900 examples across zones 1–9 (or 3700 delta-balanced)
Zone classification accuracy on synthetic test set: ≥50% (baseline 10%)
All new features have non-NaN extraction on至少90% of tracks
notes: Phase 4 is about fixing the dataset first (zone balance), then enriching features. The combination should yield the biggest accuracy jump. Vocal detection and classifier choice are secondary optimisations.
